# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/*
Plugin Name: Custom User Authentication
Plugin URI: https://example.com
Description: Custom user authentication plugin with password hashing
Version: 1.0
Author: Your Name
Author URI: https://example.com
*/

if (!defined('ABSPATH')) {
    exit;
}

class Custom_User_Authentication {
    
    private $table_name;
    
    public function __construct() {
        global $wpdb;
        $this->table_name = $wpdb->prefix . 'custom_users';
        
        register_activation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'activate'));
        register_deactivation_hook(__FILE__, array($this, 'deactivate'));
        
        add_action('init', array($this, 'init'));
        add_action('admin_menu', array($this, 'add_admin_menu'));
        add_shortcode('custom_login', array($this, 'login_form_shortcode'));
        add_shortcode('custom_register', array($this, 'register_form_shortcode'));
        
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_custom_login', array($this, 'process_login'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_nopriv_custom_register', array($this, 'process_registration'));
        add_action('wp_ajax_custom_logout', array($this, 'process_logout'));
        
        add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', array($this, 'enqueue_scripts'));
    }
    
    public function activate() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $charset_collate = $wpdb->get_charset_collate();
        
        $sql = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {$this->table_name} (
            id bigint(20) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
            username varchar(60) NOT NULL,
            email varchar(100) NOT NULL,
            password varchar(255) NOT NULL,
            created_at datetime DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
            last_login datetime DEFAULT NULL,
            status varchar(20) DEFAULT 'active',
            PRIMARY KEY  (id),
            UNIQUE KEY username (username),
            UNIQUE KEY email (email)
        ) $charset_collate;";
        
        require_once(ABSPATH . 'wp-admin/includes/upgrade.php');
        dbDelta($sql);
    }
    
    public function deactivate() {
        // Cleanup if needed
    }
    
    public function init() {
        if (!session_id()) {
            session_start();
        }
    }
    
    public function add_admin_menu() {
        add_menu_page(
            'Custom Auth Users',
            'Custom Auth',
            'manage_options',
            'custom-auth-users',
            array($this, 'admin_page'),
            'dashicons-admin-users',
            30
        );
    }
    
    public function admin_page() {
        global $wpdb;
        
        $users = $wpdb->get_results("SELECT * FROM {$this->table_name} ORDER BY created_at DESC");
        
        echo '<div class="wrap">';
        echo '<h1>Custom Authentication Users</h1>';
        echo '<table class="wp-list-table widefat fixed striped">';
        echo '<thead>';
        echo '<tr>';
        echo '<th>ID</th>';
        echo '<th>Username</th>';
        echo '<th>Email</th>';
        echo '<th>Created At</th>';
        echo '<th>Last Login</th>';
        echo '<th>Status</th>';
        echo '</tr>';
        echo '</thead>';
        echo '<tbody>';
        
        foreach ($users as $user) {
            echo '<tr>';
            echo '<td>' . esc_html($user->id) . '</td>';
            echo '<td>' . esc_html($user->username) . '</td>';
            echo '<td>' . esc_html($user->email) . '</td>';
            echo '<td>' . esc_html($user->created_at) . '</td>';
            echo '<td>' . esc_html($user->last_login ? $user->last_login : 'Never') . '</td>';
            echo '<td>' . esc_html($user->status) . '</td>';
            echo '</tr>';
        }
        
        echo '</tbody>';
        echo '</table>';
        echo '</div>';
    }
    
    public function enqueue_scripts() {
        wp_enqueue_style('custom-auth-style', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'css/style.css', array(), '1.0');
        wp_enqueue_script('custom-auth-script', plugin_dir_url(__FILE__) . 'js/script.js', array('jquery'), '1.0', true);
        
        wp_localize_script('custom-auth-script', 'customAuth', array(
            'ajaxurl' => admin_url('admin-ajax.php'),
            'nonce' => wp_create_nonce('custom_auth_nonce')
        ));
    }
    
    public function register_form_shortcode() {
        if ($this->is_user_logged_in()) {
            return '<p>You are already logged in.</p>';
        }
        
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="custom-auth-form-container">
            <h2>Register</h2>
            <div id="register-message"></div>
            <form id="custom-register-form" method="post">
                <p>
                    <label for="reg_username">Username:</label>
                    <input type="text" name="username" id="reg_username" required>
                </p>
                <p>
                    <label for="reg_email">Email:</label>
                    <input type="email" name="email" id="reg_email" required>
                </p>
                <p>
                    <label for="reg_password">Password:</label>
                    <input type="password" name="password" id="reg_password" required>
                </p>
                <p>
                    <label for="reg_confirm_password">Confirm Password:</label>
                    <input type="password" name="confirm_password" id="reg_confirm_password" required>
                </p>
                <p>
                    <input type="submit" value="Register" class="custom-auth-button">
                </p>
            </form>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
    
    public function login_form_shortcode() {
        if ($this->is_user_logged_in()) {
            $user = $this->get_current_user();
            ob_start();
            ?>
            <div class="custom-auth-form-container">
                <p>Welcome, <?php echo esc_html($user->username); ?>!</p>
                <p>Email: <?php echo esc_html($user->email); ?></p>
                <p>Last Login: <?php echo esc_html($user->last_login ? $user->last_login : 'First login'); ?></p>
                <form id="custom-logout-form" method="post">
                    <input type="submit" value="Logout" class="custom-auth-button">
                </form>
            </div>
            <?php
            return ob_get_clean();
        }
        
        ob_start();
        ?>
        <div class="custom-auth-form-container">
            <h2>Login</h2>
            <div id="login-message"></div>
            <form id="custom-login-form" method="post">
                <p>
                    <label for="login_username">Username or Email:</label>
                    <input type="text" name="username" id="login_username" required>
                </p>
                <p>
                    <label for="login_password">Password:</label>
                    <input type="password" name="password" id="login_password" required>
                </p>
                <p>
                    <input type="submit" value="Login" class="custom-auth-button">
                </p>
            </form>
        </div>
        <?php
        return ob_get_clean();
    }
    
    public function process_registration() {
        check_ajax_referer('custom_auth_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        global $wpdb;
        
        $username = sanitize_user($_POST['username']);
        $email = sanitize_email($_POST['email']);
        $password = $_POST['password'];
        $confirm_password = $_POST['confirm_password'];
        
        if (empty($username) || empty($email) || empty($password)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'All fields are required.'));
        }
        
        if (!is_email($email)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Invalid email address.'));
        }
        
        if (strlen($password) < 6) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Password must be at least 6 characters.'));
        }
        
        if ($password !== $confirm_password) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Passwords do not match.'));
        }
        
        $existing_user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE username = %s OR email = %s",
            $username, $email
        ));
        
        if ($existing_user) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Username or email already exists.'));
        }
        
        $hashed_password = $this->hash_password($password);
        
        $result = $wpdb->insert(
            $this->table_name,
            array(
                'username' => $username,
                'email' => $email,
                'password' => $hashed_password,
                'created_at' => current_time('mysql'),
                'status' => 'active'
            ),
            array('%s', '%s', '%s', '%s', '%s')
        );
        
        if ($result) {
            wp_send_json_success(array('message' => 'Registration successful! You can now login.'));
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Registration failed. Please try again.'));
        }
    }
    
    public function process_login() {
        check_ajax_referer('custom_auth_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        global $wpdb;
        
        $username = sanitize_text_field($_POST['username']);
        $password = $_POST['password'];
        
        if (empty($username) || empty($password)) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Username and password are required.'));
        }
        
        $user = $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE (username = %s OR email = %s) AND status = 'active'",
            $username, $username
        ));
        
        if (!$user) {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Invalid username or password.'));
        }
        
        if ($this->verify_password($password, $user->password)) {
            $wpdb->update(
                $this->table_name,
                array('last_login' => current_time('mysql')),
                array('id' => $user->id),
                array('%s'),
                array('%d')
            );
            
            $_SESSION['custom_auth_user_id'] = $user->id;
            $_SESSION['custom_auth_username'] = $user->username;
            
            wp_send_json_success(array(
                'message' => 'Login successful!',
                'redirect' => home_url()
            ));
        } else {
            wp_send_json_error(array('message' => 'Invalid username or password.'));
        }
    }
    
    public function process_logout() {
        check_ajax_referer('custom_auth_nonce', 'nonce');
        
        unset($_SESSION['custom_auth_user_id']);
        unset($_SESSION['custom_auth_username']);
        
        wp_send_json_success(array(
            'message' => 'Logout successful!',
            'redirect' => home_url()
        ));
    }
    
    private function hash_password($password) {
        return password_hash($password, PASSWORD_DEFAULT);
    }
    
    private function verify_password($password, $hash) {
        return password_verify($password, $hash);
    }
    
    private function is_user_logged_in() {
        return isset($_SESSION['custom_auth_user_id']) && !empty($_SESSION['custom_auth_user_id']);
    }
    
    private function get_current_user() {
        if (!$this->is_user_logged_in()) {
            return null;
        }
        
        global $wpdb;
        return $wpdb->get_row($wpdb->prepare(
            "SELECT * FROM {$this->table_name} WHERE id = %d",
            $_SESSION['custom_auth_user_id']
        ));
    }
}

new Custom_User_Authentication();

if (!is_dir(plugin_dir_path(__FILE__) . 'css')) {
    mkdir(plugin_dir_path(__FILE__) . 'css', 0755, true);
}

if (!file_exists(plugin_dir_path(__FILE__) . 'css/style.css')) {
    file_put_contents(plugin_dir_path(__FILE__) . 'css/style.css', '.custom-auth-form-container {
    max-width: 400px;
    margin: 20px auto;
    padding: 20px;
    border: 1px solid #ddd;
    border-radius: 5px;
    background-color: #f9f9f9;
}

.custom-auth-form-container h2 {
    margin-top: 0;
    text-align: center;
}

.custom-auth-form-container p {
    margin-bottom: 15px;
}

.custom-auth-form-container label {
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
    font-weight: bold;
}

.custom-auth-form-container input[type="text"],
.custom-auth-form-container input[type="email"],
.custom-auth-form-container input[type="password"] {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 8px;
    border: 1px solid #ccc;
    border-radius: 3px;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

.custom-auth-button {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 10px;
    background-color: #0073aa;
    color: white;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 3px;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 16px;
}

.custom-auth-button:hover {
    background-color: #005177;
}

#login-message,
#register-message {
    padding: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    border-radius: 3px;
    display: none;
}

#login-message.success,
#register-message.success {
    background-color: #d4edda;
    color: #155724;
    border: 1px solid #c3e6cb;
    display: block;
}

#login-message.error,
#register-message.error {
    background-color: #f8d7da;
    color: #721c24;
    border: 1px solid #f5c6cb;
    display: block;
}
');
}

if (!is_dir(plugin_dir_path(__FILE__) . 'js')) {
    mkdir(plugin_dir_path(__FILE__) . 'js', 0755, true);
}

if (!file_exists(plugin_dir_path(__FILE__) . 'js/script.js')) {
    file_put_contents(plugin_dir_path(__FILE__) . 'js/script.js', 'jQuery(document).ready(function($) {
    $("#custom-register-form").on("submit", function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        var formData = {
            action: "custom_register",
            nonce: customAuth.nonce,
            username: $("#reg_username").val(),
            email: $("#reg_email").val(),
            password: $("#reg_password").val(),
            confirm_password: $("#reg_confirm_password").val()
        };
        
        $.post(customAuth.ajaxurl, formData, function(response) {
            if (response.success) {
                $("#register-message").removeClass("error").addClass("success").text(response.data.message).show();
                $("#custom-register-form")[0].reset();
                setTimeout(function() {
                    window.location.reload();
                }, 2000);
            } else {
                $("#register-message").removeClass("success").addClass("error").text(response.data.message).show();
            }
        });
    });
    
    $("#custom-login-form").on("submit", function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        var formData = {
            action: "custom_login",
            nonce: customAuth.nonce,
            username: $("#login_username").val(),
            password: $("#login_password").val()
        };
        
        $.post(customAuth.ajaxurl, formData, function(response) {
            if (response.success) {
                $("#login-message").removeClass("error").addClass("success").text(response.data.message).show();
                setTimeout(function() {
                    window.location.href = response.data.redirect;
                }, 1000);
            } else {
                $("#login-message").removeClass("success").addClass("error").text(response.data.message).show();
            }
        });
    });
    
    $("#custom-logout-form").on("submit", function(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        
        var formData = {
            action: "custom_logout",
            nonce: customAuth.nonce
        };
        
        $.post(customAuth.ajaxurl, formData, function(response) {
            if (response.success) {
                window.location.href = response.data.redirect;
            }
        });
    });
});
');
}
